name: Stepwell
description: Nested sandstone terraces descending toward a vanishing point that drifts with every redraw — an ancient stepwell seen from above.

code.style: --wellA: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2)); --wellB: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3)); --wellC: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* every terrace drifts toward the same emitted vanishing point */ --vx: @r(-9, 9); --vy: @r(-9, 9); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--wellA); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(16% + @var(--vx) * 1%); top: calc(16% + @var(--vy) * 1%); right: calc(16% - @var(--vx) * 1%); bottom: calc(16% - @var(--vy) * 1%); background: var(--wellB); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(34% + @var(--vx) * 2%); top: calc(34% + @var(--vy) * 2%); right: calc(34% - @var(--vx) * 2%); bottom: calc(34% - @var(--vy) * 2%); background: var(--wellC); transition: ease 700ms; } } transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
